creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 233226
X server present extension patch

I ran across an issue where the X server (xorg-server-1.20.14,1) would crash if I ran xeyes.  This maybe only occur or tend to occur with Nvidia drivers according to information found within https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/xorg/xserver/-/issues/1275.

My system:
- FreeBSD 12.3-STABLE
- xorg-server-1.20.14,1
- nvidia-driver-510.60.02

While the latest xorg-server has this patch, v1.20.14 does not.
I can vouch that the X server no longer crashes with the patch applied to v1.20.14.
